title: ILBS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: The Institute of Liver & Biliary Science (ILBS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Research Scientist-I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their post-graduation and Ph.D. can apply for the ILBS Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode.
